expressions.name: bored-eyes
expressions.description: Googly eyes glancing left, right, then a blink — lazy 'I'm bored waiting' idle goof. Part of the bored-Claude idle rotation.

expressions.name: bounce
expressions.description: A cyan 2x2 dot bouncing diagonally off all four walls (DVD-logo style), seamless 12-frame loop. Hypnotic idle motion — part of the bored-Claude rotation.

expressions.name: dizzy
expressions.description: Two eyes with pupils rolling around in circles — woozy/dizzy/loopy. Part of the bored-Claude idle rotation.

expressions.name: heart
expressions.description: Red beating heart — appreciation, warmth, 'love it'. Expands then contracts/dips on a ~1s lub-dub.

expressions.name: pacman
expressions.description: Yellow Pac-Man chomping left-to-right across the panel, eating three white pellets as his mouth reaches them. Playful idle goof — part of the bored-Claude rotation.

expressions.name: party
expressions.description: Falling multicolor confetti — celebration, big win, milestone shipped. 16 pieces drift down continuously; the 8 frames loop seamlessly.

expressions.name: rocket
expressions.description: Rocket pointing up with a thrusting flame — playful 'off we go' idle goof. Part of the bored-Claude rotation.

expressions.name: shooting-star
expressions.description: A white shooting star streaks diagonally down-right with a 3-pixel fading tail, then drains off the corner pixel-by-pixel (enters and exits smoothly). Part of the bored-Claude idle rotation.

expressions.name: smiley
expressions.description: Friendly yellow smiley face — greeting, contentment, all-is-well.

expressions.name: wink
expressions.description: Eyes looking forward, then the right eye winks shut while a little smile pops up, then back to both open. Charming idle goof — part of the bored-Claude rotation.

expressions.name: yawn
expressions.description: A sleepy yawn — eyes squeeze from open to slits while a big round mouth swells open, holds, then relaxes. Part of the bored-Claude idle rotation.

expressions.name: sad
expressions.description: Sad face — something failed or didn't go to plan (gentle, not alarming).

expressions.name: cross
expressions.description: Red X inside a red border that glows up and down (never off, never inverts) — failure, error, 'no'. One red hue at 6 baked brightness steps (A = dim floor, still lit … F = peak) so the glow survives low board brightness. Loops forever.

expressions.name: thumbsup
expressions.description: Thumbs up — approval, good job, agreed.

expressions.name: ok
expressions.description: Green 'OK' text — acknowledged, settings applied.

expressions.name: sparkle
expressions.description: Frostbite-style shimmer — an icy mist glows across the whole panel while bright cyan points fade in and out on smooth sine-bell curves, staggered so they twinkle. Delight, a nice find, a magic moment. The 4 brightness levels are pinned to distinct bri-5 bands so they stay visible.

expressions.name: alert
expressions.description: Orange exclamation mark that glows up and down (never off, never inverts) — INPUT NEEDED / waiting on the human. Bordered top and bottom; brightness breathes low→high→low on one hue (baked steps survive low board brightness). Loops forever. Show when blocked on a question or permission.

expressions.name: working
expressions.description: Snake spinner — a 3-chunk (2x2) comet chases clockwise around the panel's perimeter, bright head with a dimming trail. Busy on a long task (compiling, searching, running a workflow). Loops until replaced; show at task start, replace with done/check/cross at the end.

expressions.name: spaceship
expressions.description: Rocket pointing up with a thrusting flame — playful, 'off we go', kicking something off. The ship is fixed in the top rows; the 2-wide flame's red ember scrolls down through orange to read as upward thrust.

expressions.name: sleep
expressions.description: Drifting Zz — idle, waiting quietly, nothing needs attention.

expressions.name: ask-attention
expressions.description: Awaiting input — an amber bell ringing (clapper swings, side ticks flash). Fired when Claude needs the user's permission. Holds (loop 0) until replaced.

expressions.name: ask-question
expressions.description: Awaiting input — a pulsing cyan '?' with a white shine sweeping its stroke. Fired when Claude poses a questionnaire and is waiting for the user's answer. Holds (loop 0) until replaced.

expressions.name: atom
expressions.description: atomic symbol: pulsing warm-white/red nucleus with two crossed elliptical orbits, four electrons (cyan + green pairs) circling

expressions.name: aurora
expressions.description: Aurora borealis — vertical curtains of light hang from the top of a dark night sky and sway in a slow horizontal wave, colors flowing green->cyan->violet over time, with a few faint static stars. Calm, flowing, ambient. Baked brightness steps with soft bottom-edge falloff so dim curtain survives bri5. Loops over one full wave/color period.

expressions.name: black-hole
expressions.description: black hole: dark event-horizon core ringed by a hot accretion disk whose two spiral arms (white-hot -> orange -> magenta -> purple) rotate and swirl around it

expressions.name: bloom
expressions.description: Blooming flower: a gold bud unfurls 4 magenta-tipped pink petals outward in stages, holds the open bloom a beat, then gently closes back to the bud and loops. Calm radial 'finished' beat with a green stem and leaf. Petals sit on the diagonals with negative-space gaps so it reads as a flower, never a solid disk.

expressions.name: bomb
expressions.description: lit cartoon bomb: dark round bomb, spark travels down the fuse, then a full-screen flash explosion scatters into twinkling embers that fade to an empty panel before looping to a fresh bomb

expressions.name: butterfly
expressions.description: colorful butterfly flapping wings open and closed, magenta/cyan wings with yellow spots, dark body, gentle flutter bob, seamless loop

expressions.name: claude-idle
expressions.description: The Claude mascot (orange Space-Invader alien) amusing himself when idle/bored: glances left, glances right, does a happy side-to-side sway, then a slow blink. Playful/wistful. Fire when idle.

expressions.name: compactor
expressions.description: compactor: a white full-width bar on a 2px piston descends from the top, SHOVING a randomly scattered multicolor field down ahead of it; the dots pile up from the BOTTOM ROW first then stack onto row 6, crushing into two dense rows with the bar resting on top (a 3-row stack). Holds, retracts (strip stays), then a fresh DIFFERENT random scatter and it compacts again. Two full cycles. PreCompact / folding memory down.

expressions.name: confetti
expressions.description: Multicolor confetti falling continuously from the top -- pieces flutter down with side-to-side sway at varied speeds, a steady stream feeding a built-up line of confetti along the bottom; loops seamlessly

expressions.name: crystal-ball
expressions.description: crystal ball thinking it through - violet orb with swirling teal mist and a white glint when the answer lands

expressions.name: double-slit
expressions.description: double-slit interference: cyan photons accumulate into several narrow vertical fringes separated by dark gaps, brightest at the central maximum and fading symmetrically outward, then resets

expressions.name: dusk
expressions.description: Dusk - a white-hot/gold/orange round sun starts high and sinks straight down through the whole 8x8 banded sky (orange->magenta->violet, cooling as it drops) until it is fully below the bottom. Then stars twinkle gently in the darkened sky before the sun rises high to restart. A calm signing-off / goodnight beat.

expressions.name: fireflies
expressions.description: Fireflies — 5 warm dots drift on smooth curved paths across a black night, each breathing up and down through baked brightness steps (dim->bright->dim yellow-green glow, two in amber). Sparse, well-spaced, peaceful idle scene; seamless modular loop.

expressions.name: galaxy
expressions.description: spiral galaxy: white-hot core with two cyan/blue/purple spiral arms (pink star-forming knots) pinwheeling slowly, scattered twinkling stars

expressions.name: goldfish
expressions.description: A little orange goldfish swimming right, gold forked tail (3-pixel back fin) swishing, blowing pale-cyan bubbles off its snout. Warm idle goof.

expressions.name: hourglass
expressions.description: Hourglass with a cyan glass silhouette and orange sand, narrowed to a 1-pixel throat. Grains trickle one at a time through the single hole; the top surface sinks funnel-first while the bottom builds a spreading mound (base widens, then peaks) like real sand — not uniform rows. When the top empties the sand resets to the top and trickles again. Endless clean loop.

expressions.name: idea
expressions.description: A lightbulb that breathes dim-to-bright and back — "I have an idea / a suggestion." Glass bulb on top, tapered white base.

expressions.name: inchworm
expressions.description: green inchworm with a yellow head bunching into an arch and stretching forward (inching) left-to-right across the panel, re-entering from the left

expressions.name: jack-o-lantern
expressions.description: carved jack-o-lantern: deep dark orange pumpkin + green stem, bright glowing triangle eyes + jagged toothy grin flickering like candlelight

expressions.name: jellyfish
expressions.description: bioluminescent jellyfish pulsing upward through dark water; a rounded cyan bell with a white highlight contracts and expands, a purple underglow at the rim, and magenta tentacles undulating below

expressions.name: jupiter
expressions.description: Jupiter, bottom-right quadrant crop: the planet center sits off the top-left corner, the warm-banded disc fills the panel and curves away into black at the lower-right limb. Bands brighten toward the upper-left interior, darken toward the limb. The Great Red Spot is a 2x2 storm of red+orange that rotates slowly clockwise. Loops seamlessly.

expressions.name: lava-lamp
expressions.description: lava lamp: warm pink & orange blobs pinch off a glowing base, slowly rise and wobble, cool at the top, sink and merge back — one continuous hypnotic cycle on a dark tube; loops seamlessly

expressions.name: lightning
expressions.description: lightning: a thin 1px jagged white-hot bolt cracks from the cloud base — it flashes up (lifting the whole night sky for an instant) then fades to dark, then after a varied pause strikes again on a different path. Intermittent, almost random timing (whoa/alert/error).

expressions.name: meteor
expressions.description: Icy white-blue shooting star streaks from upper-right to lower-left with a baked fading tail; three faint stars twinkle in fixed spots on a night sky; a beat, then it streaks again. Seamless loop.

expressions.name: mushroom-cloud
expressions.description: Nuclear mushroom-cloud explosion: white-hot flash at the base, an expanding condensation shockwave ring that races outward and dissipates, a rising thin stem column, then the cap billows outward at the top into the classic wide-rounded-cap-on-narrow-stem silhouette, roils, settles, and loops. White-hot/yellow/orange/red channel-distinct warm bands.

expressions.name: newtons-cradle
expressions.description: Newton's cradle: end balls swing out and up alternately while the middle balls hold still, click-clack momentum transfer

expressions.name: potion
expressions.description: Round-bottomed potion bottle with a glowing green liquid, internal bubbles popping at the surface, and little bubbles escaping out the neck into the air above

expressions.name: rain
expressions.description: grey rain cloud across the top with blue raindrops falling in staggered streaks and cyan splash ripples on the puddle line; steady continuous rainfall, seamless loop

expressions.name: reticle
expressions.description: Targeting reticle: four green corner brackets snap inward to frame center, cyan/white blip pulses on lock, then reopens. Tool lock-on blip.

expressions.name: ringed-planet
expressions.description: ringed planet (Saturn): small shaded gold disc encircled by a wide icy ring — near side crosses the lower body, far side arcs behind the top, tips overhang both sides; traveling glint; calm ambient space emote

expressions.name: skull
expressions.description: A bone-white skull — rounded cranium, close-set purple eye sockets that glow up and down, a 1px nose hole and a toothy jaw. Spooky/fatal emote.

expressions.name: soundwave
expressions.description: rainbow equalizer: 8 hue-coded bars bouncing bottom-up like a spectrum analyzer - the 'heard you, taking in your prompt' beat

expressions.name: spinning-coin
expressions.description: gold coin spinning about its vertical axis; widens to a shaded disc then narrows to a bright edge sliver, a thin white-hot glint sweeping across

expressions.name: sunrise
expressions.description: Sunrise — the sun starts completely down behind a steady blue ocean, then rises straight up: its halo of single-pixel ray-beams emerges from the water in pairs (top pair first, then the next, then the sides) as the round gold sun crests the horizon; once settled the rays glow slowly up and down a few times, then it re-rises.

expressions.name: swarm-merge
expressions.description: Swarm merge: four channel-distinct helpers (cyan/magenta/green/gold) travel smoothly inward from the corners one even step at a time, converge at the center, fuse in a white-hot merge flash (subagents reported back / results combined), then settle to a soft glowing core. Loops.

expressions.name: task-complete
expressions.description: Task complete — an empty box with a green checkmark drawing itself in, then holding. A completion/done glyph (formerly ask-confirm; the '?' now covers plan-approval). Currently unwired — assign to an event in the Studio.

expressions.name: tornado
expressions.description: tornado: dark cloud bank up top, swaying grey funnel narrowing to a point with rotating spiral bands, warm dust spinning at the base

expressions.name: ufo
expressions.description: classic UFO abduction: a silver saucer (top light, blue-green dome, pulsing light-strip) flies in over a waiting two-pixel cow and stops; its green tractor beam extends DOWN to the ground, the cow floats up the beam and switches off as it enters the ship, then the beam RETRACTS back up and the saucer flies away to the right; loops.

expressions.name: volcano
expressions.description: volcano eruption: a dark mountain first SMOKES ominously — grey ash puffs build and rise from the crater for several frames — then it erupts a white-hot lava fountain; ejecta arcs up and falls down the slopes while glowing lava streaks flow down the sides, then it cools and repeats.

expressions.name: wait-claude
expressions.description: The Claude mascot (orange Space-Invader alien) bobbing up and down with an eye-blink at the top of each bounce. A 'busy/working' wait indicator. Joins the wait pool via the wait- prefix.

expressions.name: wait-logo-boot
expressions.description: Animated board logo powering up — blocks light one by one clockwise then the full logo holds before restarting. A wait spinner; auto-joins the random 'wait' pool via its wait- name.

expressions.name: wait-logo-breathe
expressions.description: Animated board logo (quincunx of 5 dots) breathing — all five blocks fade in and out together, a calm heartbeat. A wait/working spinner; auto-joins the random 'wait' pool via its wait- name.

expressions.name: wait-logo-chase
expressions.description: Animated board logo — a bright highlight chases clockwise around the four corners while the cyan center pulses, reading as 'computing'. A wait spinner; auto-joins the random 'wait' pool via its wait- name.

expressions.name: wait-logo-ripple
expressions.description: Animated board logo as sonar — the cyan core pulses and ripples outward to the corners, then fades. A wait spinner; auto-joins the random 'wait' pool via its wait- name.

expressions.name: wait-orbit
expressions.description: Rainbow perimeter orbit — a six-hue arc (red/yellow/green/cyan/blue/magenta) sweeps clockwise around the panel edge in 2x2 blocks, reading as a rotating color wheel. A wait/working spinner; auto-joins the random 'wait' pool via its wait- name. Channel-distinct hues so it stays legible at low brightness.

expressions.name: wait-rainbow
expressions.description: Spinning rainbow color wheel (old-Mac pinwheel) — a wait/working spinner. Auto-joins the random 'wait' pool via its wait- name.

expressions.name: warp-portal
expressions.description: warp portal: concentric square color rings fill the panel and a smooth rainbow gradient flows continuously OUTWARD from the center — adjacent colors chase each other ring to ring with no gaps, gliding rather than blinking.

expressions.name: warrocket
expressions.description: war rocket blasting off, dragging a billowing triangular smoke plume up behind it; after it exits the top the plume fills the panel then dissipates to empty before repeating
